nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Stage 1: 每个工作日 AEST 07:30 触发

parameters.jsonOutput:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  GOOGLE_DRIVE_FILE_ID: '1aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ',
  LINKEDIN_SEARCH_KEYWORDS: 'Software Engineer,Backend Developer,Full Stack Developer',
  LINKEDIN_LOCATION: 'Australia',
  RECIPIENT_EMAIL: 'your.email@gmail.com',
  TOP_N_JOBS: 15,
  AI_BATCH_SIZE: 5,
  MIN_OVERALL_SCORE: 0,
  EXCLUDE_KEYWORDS: 'intern,junior,graduate',
  APIFY_DATASET_WAIT_SECS: 60,
  RUN_DATE: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  TIMEZONE: 'Australia/Sydney'
}) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Dataset

nodes.name: NormalizeData
nodes.notes: Stage 3: 统一字段名，处理缺失值

nodes.name: Filter and Deduplicate

nodes.name: IF Has Jobs
nodes.notes: 分流: 有职位 → 继续评分; 无职位 → 发送空通知

nodes.name: Prepare AI Input
nodes.notes: Stage 4: 合并 CV + JD，构造批次 prompt

nodes.name: SplitInBatches
nodes.notes: 逐批发送到 AI 评分（控制速率）

nodes.name: Score the Job
nodes.notes: Stage 5: 调用 Claude API 进行 AI 评分

nodes.name: Parse and Merge Scores
nodes.notes: Stage 5-6: 解析 AI JSON + Schema 验证 + 合并元数据

nodes.name: Rank and Top N
nodes.notes: Stage 7: 按总分降序排列，取 Top 15

nodes.name: Build Email HTML
nodes.notes: Stage 8: 生成精美 HTML 邮件报告

nodes.name: Send Email
nodes.notes: Stage 8: 通过 Gmail 发送报告邮件

parameters.jsCode:
// 无职位时发送空通知邮件 const config = $('Config').first().json; const runDate = config.RUN_DATE || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const html = `

📋 Daily Job Report

${runDate}

🔍

No New Matching Jobs Today

The automated agent searched for positions matching your profile in the Australian job market over the past 24 hours but found no new matches.

Search keywords: ${config.LINKEDIN_SEARCH_KEYWORDS}

Location: ${config.LINKEDIN_LOCATION}

The agent will search again tomorrow at 07:30 AEST.

🤖 Powered by AI Job Agent

`; return [{ json: { subject: `📋 Daily Job Report | ${runDate} | No new matches`, html: html }}];

nodes.name: Build Empty Notification
nodes.notes: 无职位时构建空通知邮件
